project_type: Next.js 15 App Router with Tailwind CSS and Firebase Firestore
build_system: npm with next build, deployed on Netlify with @netlify/plugin-nextjs
test_framework: None configured (no test runner in package.json)
test_command: No test command available - verify with build only
verification_instructions: Run npm run build to verify no compile errors. Manually verify the API route logic and client integration are correct.
setup_instructions: npm install in /projects/sandbox/cv-portal (already done, node_modules exists)
environment_constraints: Network access available for npm installs. No test framework configured. Firebase credentials are in the code. Google Drive API requires a service account key for server-side access to PDFs.
contribution_requirements: Branch is fix/sertifikat-date-picker. Code uses 'use client' directives for client components. API routes go in src/app/api/.
key_patterns: Client components use 'use client' directive. Data fetching via Firebase Firestore (getDoc/updateDoc). Translation uses client-side fetch to free APIs (src/lib/translateHelper.js). Google Drive file IDs are extracted from URLs using regex /id=([a-zA-Z0-9_-]+)/. Dates stored in Japanese format YYYY年MM月DD日. The DriveImage component already has file ID extraction logic.
directory_structure: src/app/ - Next.js app router pages; src/app/admin/edit/[id]/ - edit candidate page with certs tab; src/lib/ - helper modules (firebase, translate, cvHelpers); src/components/ - reusable components (Navbar, CVTemplate, DriveImage, JapaneseDatePicker); No src/app/api/ directory yet - needs to be created for the new API route
